text: Grok automatically translating and recommending 𝕏 posts from other languages is starting to work
summary: Grok automatically translating and recommending 𝕏 posts from other languages is starting to work
ai_summary: Elon announces that Grok, xAI's AI assistant integrated into X, has achieved functional multilingual post translation and recommendation capabilities. This represents a product development milestone for X's AI infrastructure, demonstrating progress in cross-language content discovery and engagement features that could expand the platform's utility for international users and increase content reach across language barriers.
embed_html:
Grok automatically translating and recommending 𝕏 posts from other languages is starting to work

— Elon Musk (@elonmusk) March 29, 2026

ai_summary: Elon Musk reports that a Falcon 9 booster has completed its 34th flight, demonstrating SpaceX's progress toward reusable rocket technology and rapid reusability. This milestone reflects SpaceX's core business model of reducing launch costs through booster reuse, a critical competitive advantage in commercial spaceflight and a key metric for the company's operational efficiency and profitability.
embed_html:
34th flight of this booster pic.twitter.com/sM4lQFTGA6

text:
Tesla is making a big investment in Japan with service & Superchargers. 

Many of the parts in Teslas are made in Japan. Panasonic has been our biggest strategic supplier over the past 2 decades. https://t.co/XkwdUIPeKy
summary: Tesla is making a big investment in Japan with service & Superchargers. Many of the parts in Teslas are made in Japan. Panasonic has been our biggest strategic supplier over the past 2 decades.
ai_summary: Elon Musk announced Tesla's significant capital investment in Japan focused on expanding service centers and Supercharger infrastructure, while highlighting the critical role of Japanese suppliers—particularly Panasonic—in Tesla's supply chain over the past two decades. This demonstrates a key business strategy: securing and deepening relationships with strategic suppliers through localized infrastructure investment, ensuring manufacturing resilience and supply chain stability for a global automotive operation.

text: 34th launch & landing of the same rocket https://t.co/OK4xGVFSs6
summary: 34th launch & landing of the same rocket
ai_summary: Elon Musk announces SpaceX's 34th successful launch and landing of the same Falcon 9 rocket, demonstrating the company's achievement in rocket reusability. This milestone illustrates a core SpaceX business strategy of reducing launch costs through rapid rocket reuse, which is fundamental to making space transportation economically viable and competitive. The post reflects significant progress in SpaceX's engineering execution and manufacturing capability to support repeated operations of the same vehicle.

34th launch & landing of the same rocket https://t.co/OK4xGVFSs6

— Elon Musk (@elonmusk) March 30, 2026

text: In 4 or 5 years, there will be a launch every hour https://t.co/dipVNmkuQQ
summary: In 4 or 5 years, there will be a launch every hour
ai_summary: Elon Musk projects that SpaceX will achieve unprecedented launch cadence, reaching one launch per hour within 4-5 years. This reflects SpaceX's strategy to dramatically scale rocket reusability and operational efficiency, demonstrating a concrete near-term execution goal for moving toward fully rapid-reusable spaceflight—a key metric for reducing launch costs and enabling lunar/Mars missions at scale.
